summary: Completed comprehensive testing of pagination contracts, Supabase storage migration, analytics period tabs, crew portal, and UI pagination. All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified analytics period tabs (daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly/annual), owner queue pagination (Page 1 of 2 · 16 records), exports pagination, settings page Supabase wording, jobs page pagination, and crew portal (no raw IDCREWID_ string exposed).

issues: React console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' when switching period tabs - minor key collision in chart rendering

action_items: Optional: Fix React key collision warning in AnalyticsPage.jsx chart components when switching period tabs
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is very large (>700 lines) - consider modularizing into separate files for auth, jobs, submissions, reviews, analytics, exports, integrations
test_credentials: Used Owner (owner@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!) and Production Manager (production.manager@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!) from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Created TEST submissions via API to validate Supabase upload and file retrieval routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 validated all requested features: (1) Supabase storage upload/retrieval working with qa-images bucket, (2) All paginated endpoints return correct {items, pagination} structure, (3) Owner queue shows 'Page 1 of 2 · 16 records' with working Prev/Next buttons, (4) Exports history has pagination, (5) Analytics period tabs (daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly/annual) all functional, (6) Settings page shows 'Supabase storage' wording instead of Google Drive, (7) Crew portal shows 'Crew pass active' instead of raw IDCREWID_ string. No mocked APIs.

supabase_storage.upload_3_photos: PASS - Photos uploaded to qa-images bucket with source_type=supabase
supabase_storage.upload_issue_photo: PASS - Issue photos uploaded to issues folder

pagination_contracts.crew_access_links: PASS - Returns paginated response with status filter

owner_queue_pagination.ui_pagination: PASS - Shows 'Page 1 of 2 · 16 records' with Prev/Next buttons
owner_queue_pagination.page_navigation: PASS - Next button navigates to page 2

features_verified.settings_supabase_wording: PASS - Shows 'Supabase storage' and 'Backend-managed image storage'

crew_portal.hides_raw_idcrewid: PASS - Shows 'Crew pass active' instead of raw ID
